claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Governance bodies: General Assembly (biannual), Project Management Committee (quarterly), Ethics and Quality Oversight Committee (as needed, minimum biannual)

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Eleven implementation risks documented
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase6_implementation_architecture/implementation_architecture.json (risk_register array: RISK-01 through RISK-11, exactly 11 entries)

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: RISK-01: neuro-symbolic integration, Medium likelihood, High impact; mitigated by modular fallback architecture and M6 integration testing
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase6_implementation_architecture/implementation_architecture.json (risk_register[RISK-01]: likelihood:medium; impact:high; mitigation: modular architecture with fallback; integration testing from M6; responsible_partner:ATU)

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: RISK-04: clinical dataset access delay, Medium likelihood, High impact; mitigated by M1 ethics submission and public dataset fallback
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase6_implementation_architecture/implementation_architecture.json (risk_register[RISK-04]: likelihood:medium; impact:high; mitigation: Submit ethics applications in M1; public datasets MIMIC-IV, eICU; responsible_partner:NIHS)

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: RISK-10: framework integration risk, Medium likelihood, High impact; mitigated by M1-M3 API contract definition
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase6_implementation_architecture/implementation_architecture.json (risk_register[RISK-10]: likelihood:medium; impact:high; mitigation: Define API contracts, tool registry schemas, integration interfaces in M1-M3; responsible_partner:FIIT)

claim_audit_results.claim_summary: RISK-07: LLM evolution pace, High likelihood, Medium impact; addressed via model-agnostic component interfaces and annual baseline re-evaluation
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier4_orchestration_state/phase_outputs/phase6_implementation_architecture/implementation_architecture.json (risk_register[RISK-07]: likelihood:high; impact:medium; mitigation: model-agnostic interfaces; annual baseline re-evaluation at M12/M24/M36; responsible_partner:BAL)
